title: Bridge Paper: Serotonergic psychedelics and personality: A systematic review of contemporary research.
author: Frontier Science / Hermes T2

body.text: This bridge paper connects the esoteric/philosophical concept of **Visionary Cosmologies** with mechanistic science from PubMed/MEDLINE.
**Bridge thesis:** Self-transcendence — mystical experience, cosmic consciousness, awe, numinous in neuroscience.
**Phase context:** self-transcendence, transcendence, cosmic consciousness, mystical experience, awe

Paper: Serotonergic psychedelics and personality: A systematic review of contemporary research.
DOI: 10.1016/j.neubiorev.2018.02.004
Abstract: Serotonergic psychedelics act as agonists at cortical 5-HT2A receptors and seem to induce personality changes. We conducted a systematic review of studies assessing the effects of these drugs on personality. Papers published from 1985-2016 were included from PubMed, LILACS, and SciELO databases. Three hundred and sixty-nine studies were identified, and 18 were included.
